PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated July 13, 1999 is admitted to probate. First Republic Trust Company is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 6, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Frank Mahoney, III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-15-2023 Continued To Apr-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
